name: AI Developer
description: Builds applications on top of the agent framework

name: Autonomous Task Execution
description: Tasks should complete without constant supervision

name: Reliable Multi-Agent Coordination
description: Agents collaborate predictably toward a goal

name: Tool-Use Safety
description: Agents may only call whitelisted sandboxed tools

name: Deterministic Replay
description: Any agent run MUST be replayable from its trace

name: Pluggable Models
description: Swap LLM providers without code changes

name: Agent Orchestration
description: The capability to plan and coordinate AI agents

name: Task Decomposition
description: Agent autonomously breaks a goal into ordered sub-tasks

name: Result Verification
description: Critic agent checks a result against the goal

name: Agent Task
description: A unit of work assigned to an agent

name: Planner Agent
description: Decomposes goals into a task plan

name: Executor Agent
description: Carries out individual tasks using tools

name: Memory Store
description: Short and long term agent memory

name: Tool Invocation
description: Executes a tool call on behalf of an agent

name: Tool Catalog
description: Definitions and schemas of available tools

name: Run Trace
description: Full ordered log enabling deterministic replay

name: NATS Broker
description: Message broker backing the message bus
